skills.description: 释放火球术，将对敌人造成基础的魔法伤害

description_localized.zh: 释放火球术，将对敌人造成基础的魔法伤害
description_localized.en: Launches a fireball, dealing basic magic damage to the enemy.

skills.description: 释放灼烧，将对敌人造成基础的魔法伤害，并给予敌人灼烧效果

description_localized.zh: 释放灼烧，将对敌人造成基础的魔法伤害，并给予敌人灼烧效果
description_localized.en: Deals basic magic damage and applies the Burning effect to the enemy.

skills.description: 释放冰刺，将对敌人造成基础的魔法伤害，并给予敌人2层冰冻效果，当冰冻达到4层时，敌人将失去一回合行动

description_localized.zh: 释放冰刺，将对敌人造成基础的魔法伤害，并给予敌人2层冰冻效果，当冰冻达到4层时，敌人将失去一回合行动
description_localized.en: Launches an ice spike dealing magic damage and inflicts 2 stacks of Freeze. At 4 stacks, the enemy loses a turn.

skills.description: 吸血，将对敌人造成基础的物理伤害，并为自身恢复一定比例的血量

description_localized.zh: 吸血，将对敌人造成基础的物理伤害，并为自身恢复一定比例的血量
description_localized.en: Drains the enemy's blood, dealing physical damage and restoring a portion of your HP.

skills.description: 虚无化的体质将免减所有物理伤害

description_localized.zh: 虚无化的体质将免减所有物理伤害
description_localized.en: Nihilize your body, reducing all physical damage taken.
A heavy strike with a 50% chance to stun the target.

skills.description: 冰霜连击，每次攻击都会增加冰冻，并有一定概率再进行下一次攻击，逐步递减概率

description_localized.zh: 冰霜连击，每次攻击都会增加冰冻，并有一定概率再进行下一次攻击，逐步递减概率
description_localized.en: A combo of frost strikes. Each hit builds up Freeze and may trigger another hit with diminishing probability.

skills.description: 虚无化的体质将免减所有物理伤害

description_localized.zh: 虚无化的体质将免减所有物理伤害
description_localized.en: Nihilize your body, reducing all physical damage taken.
